exportMeta.note: This file contains aggregated analytics data structure. Data content includes visitor analytics collected from the portfolio website.
exportMeta.privacyNote: All data is anonymized. No personal information (IP, user agents, identifiers) is collected.

instructions.collectingData: Visitors' browsers automatically collect anonymous analytics data in localStorage while browsing the portfolio.
instructions.accessingData: Visit /analytics.html on the live site to view your own analytics dashboard.
instructions.exportingData: Use the export function in the analytics dashboard to download your data locally.
instructions.githubIntegration: To contribute your analytics summary, copy the aggregated data from the dashboard and submit it as a GitHub Discussion.
